name: fallow
description: Codebase intelligence for TypeScript and JavaScript. Finds unused code, duplication, circular dependencies, complexity hotspots, and architecture drift. Optional runtime intelligence layer (Fallow Runtime) adds production execution evidence. Rust-native,
